allow: Bash(python -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Top-level keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\) print\('analytics:', json.dumps\(d.get\('analytics',{}\), indent=2\)[:600]\) print\(\) print\('oi_signals:', json.dumps\(d.get\('oi_signals',{}\), indent=2\)[:400]\) print\(\) chain = d.get\('chain',[]\) print\('Chain length:', len\(chain\)\) if chain: row = chain[0] print\('Row keys:', list\(row.keys\(\)\)\) ce = row.get\('ce',{}\) print\('CE keys:', list\(ce.keys\(\)\)\) print\('Sample CE:', json.dumps\(ce, indent=2\)[:500]\) ")
